parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

data.description: Represents a project with its details and configurations.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Bid Board project.

name.description: The name of the Bid Board project.

description.description: The description of the Bid Board project.

created_on.description: The creation date of the Bid Board project.

due_date.description: The due date of the Bid Board project.

last_status_change.description: The date when the Bid Board project's status was last changed.

status.description: The current status of the project.

archived.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project is archived.

use_metric_units.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project uses metric units.

use_hip_and_valley.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project includes hip and valley calculations.

use_tax_from_cost.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project uses tax calculations based on cost.

individual_labor_rates.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project uses individual labor rates.

total.description: The total cost or value associated with the Bid Board project.

completed_tasks.description: The number of completed tasks in the Bid Board project.

total_tasks.description: The total number of tasks in the Bid Board project.

total_notes.description: The total number of notes associated with the Bid Board project.

square_footage.description: The square footage of the Bid Board project.

pricing_locked.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project pricing is locked.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project is deleted.

address.description: The address associated with the Bid Board project.

zip.description: The zip code of the address.

is_template.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project is a template.

use_unit_labor_cost.description: Indicates whether the Bid Board project uses unit labor cost.

wbs_validation_enabled.description: Indicates whether WBS validation is enabled for the Bid Board project.

disable_ea_parts_rounding.description: Indicates whether EA parts rounding is disabled for the Bid Board project.

schema.description: Represents a request to clone a Bid Board project.

name.description: The name of the new Bid Board project.

as_template.description: Indicates whether the new Bid Board project should be created as a template.
